title: Obsidian Expanded
description: Adds a couple of obsidian based items and crafting recipes.
body:
**Obsidian Expanded!** _(Forge 1.20.1)_

Unleash the true **potential** of Obsidian with the **Obsidian Expanded** mod! This mod adds powerful new gear and tools to give you an edge in your adventures, but be prepared to handle the weight of this new power.

**Features:**

- **Obsidian Armor:** This formidable armor offers 50 knockback resistance and unmatched damage resistance, surpassing even Netherite. However, great power comes at a cost—wearing this armor curses you with Slowness V. Perfect for battles where resilience is far better than speed.

- **Obsidian Mallet:** Wield the Obsidian Mallet to deliver devastating blows with its high attack damage. Be mindful of its very slow attack speed, as it takes a while to restabilize after each swing. Ideal for players who prefer strategic, powerful strikes over rapid hits.

- **Obsidian Shard:** Utilize the Obsidian Shard as a versatile tool for mining or as a primitive weapon. These shards can also be used in place of flint for crafting arrows, making them a valuable resource for both survival and combat.

**Why You Need This Mod:**

- **Ultimate Defense:** With Obsidian Armor, you become a nearly immovable force, capable of withstanding even the toughest enemies.

- **Crushing Power:** The Obsidian Mallet delivers raw power with every strike, perfect for players who enjoy a more measured and impactful combat style.

- **Versatility:** The Obsidian Shard's infinite uses make it an essential part of your toolkit, providing both offense and utility in one neat package.

**Obsidian Expanded** transforms the way you think about Obsidian, providing you with formidable gear and tools to conquer any challenge. Are you ready to embrace the power of Obsidian and dominate your world like never before?
